title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint to v6.7.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [eslint](https://eslint.org) ([source](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint)) | devDependencies | minor | [`6.6.0` -> `6.7.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/eslint/6.6.0/6.7.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>eslint/eslint</summary>

### [`v6.7.0`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/releases/v6.7.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/compare/v6.6.0...v6.7.0)

-   [`312a88f`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/312a88f2230082d898b7d8d82f8af63cb352e55a) New: Add grouped-accessor-pairs rule (fixes [#​12277](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12277)) ([#​12331](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12331)) (Milos Djermanovic)
-   [`5c68f5f`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/5c68f5feeb4a6c0cb53ff76b2fd255b5bfa69c93) Update: Add 'lexicalBindings' to no-implicit-globals and change messages ([#​11996](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/11996)) (Milos Djermanovic)
-   [`6eaad96`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/6eaad964ff159d0a38de96c1104782ffe6858c78) New: Add suggestions API ([#​12384](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12384)) (Will Douglas)
-   [`b336fbe`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/b336fbedecd85731611fdc2dfd8edb635a8b1c39) Fix: indent rule with JSX spread props ([#​12581](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12581)) (Nathan Woltman)
-   [`97c745d`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/97c745dc277febbea82552a4d9186e3df847f860) Update: Report assignment expression location in no-cond-assign ([#​12465](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12465)) (Milos Djermanovic)
-   [`0f01f3d`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/0f01f3d0807c580631c2fdcff29192a64a870637) Update: Check member expressions with `this` in operator-assignment ([#​12495](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12495)) (Milos Djermanovic)
-   [`62c7038`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/62c7038a493d89e4a7b14ac673a063d09d04057b) Fix: invalid token checking in computed-property-spacing (fixes [#​12198](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12198)) ([#​12533](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12533)) (YeonJuan)
-   [`4f8a1ee`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/4f8a1ee1c26ccb5882e5e83ea7eab2f406c7476b) Update: Add enforceForClassMembers option to no-useless-computed-key ([#​12110](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12110)) (ark120202)
-   [`1a2eb99`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/1a2eb99f11c65813bba11d6576a06cff2b823cc9) New: new rule no-constructor-return (fixes [#​12481](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12481)) ([#​12529](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12529)) (Pig Fang)
-   [`ca3b2a6`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/ca3b2a62c9e829dc4534bca3643d6bc729b46df0) New: ignorePatterns in config files (refs [eslint/rfcs#​22](https://togithub.com/eslint/rfcs/issues/22)) ([#​12274](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12274)) (Toru Nagashima)

-   [`62623f9`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/62623f9f611a3adb79696304760a2fd14be8afbc) Fix: preserve whitespace in multiline-comment-style (fixes [#​12312](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12312)) ([#​12316](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12316)) (Kai Cataldo)
-   [`17a8849`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/17a8849491a983f6cb8e98da8c0c9d52ff5f2aa6) New: Add no-dupe-else-if rule (fixes [#​12469](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12469)) ([#​12504](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12504)) (Milos Djermanovic)

-   [`0afb518`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/0afb518d1f139376245613dddd8eaef32b52d619) Fix: invalid autofix in function-call-argument-newline (fixes [#​12454](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12454)) ([#​12539](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12539)) (YeonJuan)

-   [`f49f1e0`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/f49f1e0a69afa49f6548af7b2c0e6347e1ea022d) Upgrade: upgrade optionator to avoid license issue (fixes [#​11536](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/11536)) ([#​12537](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12537)) (Pig Fang)

-   [`ac60621`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/commit/ac606217d4beebc35b865d14a7f9723fd21faa48) Fix: unexpected autofix in prefer-const (fixes [#​12514](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12514)) ([#​12521](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12521)) (YeonJuan)
